modules.purpose: Double-entry financial accounting: record all financial transactions, manage chart of accounts, produce statutory and management financial reports.
keyFeatures: Hierarchical Chart of Accounts (root types Asset/Liability/Income/Expense/Equity; group vs ledger accounts)
Double-entry General Ledger (every submitted transaction posts balanced GL Entries)
Sales Invoice and Purchase Invoice (with taxes, discounts, payment terms)
Journal Entry for manual/adjusting entries
Payment Entry and Payment Reconciliation (allocate against invoices)
Fiscal Year, accounting periods, period-close voucher
Cost Center and dimension-based accounting; Budget control
Multi-currency with exchange rate handling
Taxes and Charges templates (sales/purchase), tax rules, tax withholding (TDS)
Bank reconciliation, bank statement import
Financial reports: General Ledger, Trial Balance, Balance Sheet, P&L, Cash Flow, AR/AP ageing

modules.purpose: Track inventory quantity and value across warehouses; maintain an immutable stock ledger and perpetual inventory valuation.
keyFeatures: Item master with Item Groups, variants/attributes, UOM conversions
Warehouse tree (group/leaf), Bin (per item-warehouse balance cache)
Stock Ledger Entry: immutable per-movement ledger (qty + valuation)
Valuation methods: FIFO, Moving Average, and serial/batch-specific valuation
Stock transactions: Stock Entry (transfer/issue/receipt/manufacture/repack), Delivery Note, Purchase Receipt
Material Request (purchase/transfer/manufacture/material issue)
Batch and Serial No tracking; Quality Inspection linkage
Stock Reconciliation (opening stock / physical count adjustments)
Reposting engine for back-dated transactions
Reports: Stock Balance, Stock Ledger, Stock Ageing, Stock Projected Qty

modules.purpose: Manage the order-to-cash sales cycle from quotation through invoicing.
keyFeatures: Sales cycle: Quotation -> Sales Order -> Delivery Note -> Sales Invoice
Customer and Customer Group masters; territory and sales person hierarchy
Price List and Item Price; Pricing Rule (discounts, free items)
Product Bundle (sales kit/BOM-less bundle)
Taxes and Charges templates, shipping rules
Sales analytics and Sales Order Analysis reporting
Drop-ship and blanket order support

modules.purpose: Manage the procure-to-pay cycle from requisition through supplier invoicing.
keyFeatures: Procurement cycle: Material Request -> RFQ -> Supplier Quotation -> Purchase Order -> Purchase Receipt -> Purchase Invoice
Supplier and Supplier Group masters; supplier scorecard
Request for Quotation with multi-supplier comparison
Purchase taxes and charges, payment terms
Subcontracting (supply raw materials to supplier)
Buying analytics / Purchase Order Analysis

modules.purpose: Capture and nurture leads, track opportunities, and convert prospects to customers.
keyFeatures: Lead capture and qualification through a sales funnel
Opportunity tracking with probability and forecasting
Contact and Address masters shared across parties
Campaign management and lead sources
Communication / activity logging (calls, meetings, emails, ToDos)
Conversion of Lead/Opportunity into Quotation/Customer

modules.purpose: Plan and execute projects, track tasks, time, and profitability.
keyFeatures: Project and Task hierarchy with dependencies and Gantt
Timesheet capture and billing
Project costing and profitability (budget vs actual)
Activity Type and Activity Cost
Integration with Sales Invoice (billable timesheets) and issues

modules.purpose: Manage customer support tickets, SLAs, and service agreements.
keyFeatures: Issue (support ticket) tracking with priority/status
Service Level Agreement (SLA) with response/resolution targets and holiday lists
Warranty Claim and Maintenance linkage
Email-to-ticket and customer portal access
Note: ERPNext core has Issue; a separate standalone Frappe Helpdesk app provides HD Ticket and a modern helpdesk UI.

modules.purpose: Manage fixed assets across their lifecycle: acquisition, depreciation, maintenance, movement, disposal.
keyFeatures: Asset and Asset Category (shared depreciation rules)
Depreciation methods: Straight Line, Written Down Value, Double Declining Balance, Manual
Auto-create assets on Purchase Receipt; manual and composite (capitalization) creation
Depreciation schedule posting Journal Entries; salvage value, pro-rata, shift-based depreciation
Asset Maintenance, Asset Repair, Asset Movement (location/custodian)
Asset disposal: scrap, sell, value adjustment

modules.purpose: Plan and execute production: define product structures, schedule and run work orders, consume materials.
keyFeatures: Bill of Materials (BOM) with sub-assemblies, operations, scrap, costing
Work Order: execute a BOM, track material transfer and finished goods
Job Card: per-operation tracking at a Workstation, time logs
Production Plan: demand-driven material requests and work orders
Operation, Routing, Workstation masters
Subcontracting and multi-level BOM; BOM update tool

modules.purpose: Manage the employee lifecycle, attendance, leave, and payroll. Now delivered as the separate Frappe HR (hrms) app (split out of ERPNext core around v14).
keyFeatures: Employee master and lifecycle (onboarding, promotion/transfer, separation)
Attendance (incl. geolocation check-in), Shift management, Holiday List
Leave Application, Leave Allocation, Leave Policy, Leave Type
Salary Structure, Salary Component, Salary Slip, Payroll Entry
Income tax / statutory configuration; off-cycle and bonus payments
Expense Claim and Employee Advance with multi-level approval
Recruitment (Job Opening, Job Applicant), Appraisal (KRA/goals)

modules.purpose: Quality management: inspections, quality goals, procedures, reviews, and non-conformance.
keyFeatures: Quality Inspection (incoming/in-process/outgoing) with parameter readings
Quality Inspection Template (parameters and acceptance criteria)
Quality Goal, Quality Procedure, Quality Review, Quality Meeting
Non Conformance and Quality Action / Feedback
Linkage from Purchase Receipt, Delivery Note, Work Order, Stock Entry

modules.purpose: Schedule and record preventive and corrective maintenance for sold/owned items and assets.
keyFeatures: Maintenance Schedule (periodic visit plan per item/serial)
Maintenance Visit (record of service performed)
Asset Maintenance and Asset Maintenance Log (asset-side)
Warranty Claim linkage from Support

modules.purpose: Built-in website builder and customer/supplier self-service portal driven by Frappe's web framework.
keyFeatures: Web Page, Blog Post, Web Form (no-code forms backed by DocTypes)
Portal pages: customer can view orders/invoices/issues; supplier RFQ portal
Navbar/footer/website settings, themes
Web Form -> DocType submission; portal sidebar and homepage configuration

modules.purpose: Sell online (web shop) and at point of sale.
keyFeatures: Webshop (separate Frappe Webshop app in recent versions): item listing, cart, online orders
POS Profile (warehouse, payment modes, price list, write-off account)
POS Invoice (offline-capable point-of-sale Sales Invoice)
POS Opening Entry / POS Closing Entry (shift cash reconciliation)
Loyalty Program, Mode of Payment

modules.purpose: The metadata-driven low-code framework that ERPNext is built on; provides the data model, UI, API, workflow, permissions, reporting and customization engine.
keyFeatures: DocType: metadata defines a model+view and generates a tab{DocType} SQL table; normal/child/single/virtual variants
Workflow engine: Workflow, Workflow State, Workflow Action, Workflow Transition with role-gated transitions and conditions
Roles & Permissions: Role, DocPerm (read/write/create/delete/submit/cancel/amend/report/export/import/share/print/email), permlevel field-level control, User Permissions
Reports: Report Builder, Query Report (SQL), Script Report (Python), Dashboard/Number/Chart
Print Formats: standard auto print, Print Format Builder, Jinja/HTML formats
REST API: auto-generated /api/resource/{doctype} CRUD and /api/method/{path} whitelisted calls; token & OAuth auth
Customization: Custom Field, Property Setter (Customize Form), Naming Series, Client Script, Server Script, Notification, Email Alert
Data Import / Export (CSV/Excel) and Bulk Update
Audit: docstatus (0 draft / 1 submitted / 2 cancelled), Version doctype (field-level change log), Document Follow, comments/activity
